mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, gender, birthday, game_id, level, rating, status, create_time, update_time FROM user ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, gender, birthday, game_id, level, rating, status, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE id = #{userId}
SELECT id, username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, gender, birthday, game_id, level, rating, status, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user( username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, gender, birthday, game_id, level, rating, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{gameId}, #{level}, #{rating}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, gender = #{gender}, birthday = #{birthday}, game_id = #{gameId}, level = #{level}, rating = #{rating}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
